diff:
diff --git a/sample/parse.py b/sample/parse.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..997185d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/sample/parse.py
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+import json
+
+
+def load_config(path, defaults={}):
+    data = json.load(open(path))
+    for k in defaults:
+        if k not in data:
+            data[k] = defaults[k]
+    return data
